dashboard.label: SQL Server Fleet — Operations Deep-Dive
dashboard.description: Per-host event drill-down for SQL DBAs / on-call. Event-driven: WinEventLog Application + System only. No add-ons required.

search.query: eventtype=sql_engine_events OR eventtype=sql_agent_events OR eventtype=sql_service_events OR eventtype=sql_custom_telemetry | eval host=lower(coalesce(ComputerName,host)) | lookup sql_inventory_lookup host OUTPUT env role ag_cluster owner tier | where isnotnull(env) | search $env_tok$ host=$host_tok$

search eventtype=sql_service_events | eval action=case( EventCode==7036,"State change", EventCode==7034,"Crashed", EventCode==7031,"Terminated unexpectedly", EventCode==7000,"Failed to start", true(),"Other ("+EventCode+")") | table _time host env action Message | rename _time as Time host as Host env as Env action as Action | sort - Time

search EventCode=18456 | rex field=Message "(?i)Login failed for user '(?<login_user>[^']+)'" | rex field=Message "(?i)CLIENT:\s*\[?(?<client_ip>[0-9a-fA-F\.\:]+)\]?" | stats count latest(_time) as last_seen by host env login_user client_ip | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort - count | rename host as Host env as Env login_user as "Login" client_ip as "Client IP" count as Attempts last_seen as "Last Seen"

search EventCode IN (824,825,9002,1105,17066,17310,17890) | eval issue=case( EventCode==824,"Logical consistency I/O error", EventCode==825,"I/O retry succeeded (failing disk)", EventCode==9002,"Transaction log full", EventCode==1105,"Data file full", EventCode==17066,"Assertion failure", EventCode==17310,"Stack dump", EventCode==17890,"Significant memory paging") | table _time host env issue Message | rename _time as Time host as Host env as Env issue as Issue | sort - Time

format.colorPalette: {"Logical consistency I/O error":#dc4e41,"Stack dump":#dc4e41,"Assertion failure":#dc4e41,"Transaction log full":#dc4e41,"Data file full":#dc4e41,"I/O retry succeeded (failing disk)":#f8be34,"Significant memory paging":#f8be34}

search.query: search EventCode=833 | timechart span=30m count by host limit=10
search EventCode IN (3014,3041) | eval outcome=if(EventCode==3014,"success","failure") | timechart span=1h count by outcome

search EventCode=3041 | rex field=Message "(?i)database\s*['\"]?(?<db>[A-Za-z0-9_\-\.]+)" | stats count latest(_time) as last_seen by host env db | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort - last_seen | rename host as Host env as Env db as Database count as Failures last_seen as "Last Failure"

panel.title: SQL Agent Job Failures (208) by Host

search.query: search eventtype=sql_agent_events EventCode=208 | rex field=Message "(?ms)Job\s+['\"]?(?<job_name>[^'\"\r\n]+?)['\"]?\s" | rex field=Message "(?ms)step\s+(?<step_id>\d+)" | stats count latest(_time) as last_seen by host env job_name step_id | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort - count | rename host as Host env as Env job_name as Job step_id as Step count as Failures last_seen as "Last Failure"

search EventCode IN (1480,35206,35264,35265,41131) | eval ag_event=case( EventCode==1480,"Role change", EventCode==35206,"Connection timeout", EventCode==35264,"Suspended", EventCode==35265,"Resumed", EventCode==41131,"Online") | table _time host env ag_cluster role ag_event Message | rename _time as Time host as Host env as Env ag_cluster as AG role as "Inv Role" ag_event as Event | sort - Time

panel.title: Custom Telemetry — Runaway Job Anomalies (Modified Z-Score)

search.query: search eventtype=sql_custom_telemetry EventCode=2001 | rex field=Message "(?ms)(?<json>\{.*\})" | spath input=json | stats max(ModifiedZScore) as MaxZ max(CurrentDurationSeconds) as MaxDurSec avg(HistoricalMedianSeconds) as MedianSec count as Anomalies latest(_time) as last_seen by env host JobName | eval MaxZ=round(MaxZ,2), MaxDurMin=round(MaxDurSec/60,1), MedianMin=round(MedianSec/60,1), last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | fields env host JobName Anomalies MaxZ MaxDurMin MedianMin last_seen | rename env as Env host as Host JobName as Job MaxDurMin as "Current (min)" MedianMin as "Median (min)" last_seen as "Last Seen" | sort - MaxZ

search eventtype=sql_custom_telemetry EventCode=1001 | rex field=Message "(?ms)(?<json>\{.*\})" | spath input=json | stats latest(_time) as last_seen count by env host SessionId BlockedBy WaitType Program | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | rename env as Env host as Host SessionId as SPID BlockedBy as "Blocked By" WaitType as Wait Program as "Program" count as Hits last_seen as "Last Seen" | sort - Hits
